text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle and I are on the way home from an
outing when we decide to stop by the shopping
district.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: What's that sign say, Trainer? "Rif"... "Ruffle"?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It looks like there's a raffle going on.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: You two over there! Care to try your luck?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Wow! So this is what a Japanese raffle looks like!
I've been itchin' to try one!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Let's check it out, Trainer! We could win ourselves
somethin' big!
choice_data_list: We have to buy something to get a raffle ticket.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oops, I clean forgot about that part! Let's see...
What should I buy?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All right, I've got just the thing! I'm gonna buy me
a jug o' milk!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...And so, we receive one raffle ticket.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
We've only got one chance! Sure seems like a
long shot...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: But I'm still gunnin' for the top prize!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! C'mooon, grand-prize!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki pumps herself up and gives the raffle
spinner an enthusiastic whirl.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the spinner's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeehaaaw! Now this has made my day!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I did it, Trainer! So when are we goin'?
choice_data_list: Y-you want to go with me?
Y-you want to go with me?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Well, of course! We're in this together!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
When do ya wanna head out? Maybe
tomorrow—or the day after that? Or how 'bout
right now?! 'Kay, let's pack our things and go!
choice_data_list: H-hold on! Let's save it for later!
H-hold on! Let's save it for later!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Later, huh?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. Are you sayin' I haven't worked hard
enough to go to a hot spring yet?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And it's a waste to go when you're not tuckered
out? That's some true Japanese spirit right there!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I got ya! Let's go when the time is right! It's
a promise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It would be nice to use the trip as a reward once
she reaches a milestone...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that in mind, I decide to hold on to her
ticket for the time being.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Nooo! I was so close!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But this big ol' hamburger steak does look packed
full of energy!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Plus, huge slabs of meat remind me of my
family back home!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, we oughta take a picture so I can show my
folks what I won!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Get over here, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Say cheese!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Taiki Shuttle wolfs down the deluxe
hamburger steak and fills up with enough energy
to last into the next day.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ooh, we almost had it! Drat!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But, these carrots are so shiny—they look
delicious!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Since we got so many, what say we invite
everybody in the dorm over for a big ol'
barbecue?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure it'll be a hoot! Let's go right now and get
started!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That night, everyone thoroughly enjoys
themselves at the carrot-centric barbecue.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Aww! Third-prize?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Urgh... That don't mean I gotta like it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Okay, here's what we're gonna do! We're gonna
keep on shoppin' till we get another ticket!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It won't be cheap, but I need that grand-prize...
Heck, I'll even make do with first or second!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I talk Taiki Shuttle out of her raffle fervor and
half drag her back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oof... This raffle's pretty rough. I guess life ain't
all sunshine and rainbows, huh?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So this is how my first raffle ends...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I join Taiki Shuttle in her disappointment...
